name: OpenClaw MCP Tools
description: Bridges MCP server tools as native OpenClaw tools, enabling direct AI invocation without skill or mcporter intermediaries.

servers.description: List of MCP servers to connect

name.description: Unique name for this MCP server

type.description: Transport type for the MCP server

enabled.description: Whether this server is enabled (default: true)

toolFilter.description: Optional list of tool names to include (all if empty)

autoReconnect.description: Automatically reconnect to MCP servers on disconnect (default: true)

toolCallTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for tool calls in milliseconds (default: 60000)

servers.label: MCP Servers
servers.help: Configure MCP servers to bridge their tools into OpenClaw

servers.name.label: Server Name
servers.name.help: Unique identifier for this MCP server

servers.type.label: Type
servers.type.help: Transport type: stdio (local process), sse (legacy HTTP), streamableHttp (recommended)

servers.headers.label: Headers
servers.headers.help: HTTP headers for streamableHttp transport (e.g., Authorization: Bearer xxx)

servers.toolPrefix.label: Tool Prefix
servers.toolPrefix.help: Prefix to add to tool names (e.g., 'web_' makes 'search' become 'web_search')

servers.toolFilter.label: Tool Filter
servers.toolFilter.help: Only include these tools (leave empty for all tools)

autoReconnect.label: Auto Reconnect
autoReconnect.help: Automatically reconnect if connection is lost

toolCallTimeoutMs.label: Tool Call Timeout (ms)
toolCallTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a tool response
